_comment: Recommended permission patterns for ~/.claude/settings.json. Used by /claudiator-setup to offer missing permissions. Categories are presented to the user for opt-in. Never removes existing entries.

categories.name: Core CLI Tools
categories.description: Essential shell commands for file navigation, git, and GitHub CLI.

categories.name: Python Ecosystem
categories.description: Python interpreter, package management, testing, and linting.

categories.name: Node.js Ecosystem
categories.description: Node runtime, npm/npx, and code formatting.

categories.name: Data & Analytics Tools
categories.description: Snowflake, dbt, and database CLI tools.

categories.name: Browser Automation
categories.description: Headless Chrome/Chromium for screenshots and visual testing (used by design-review skill).

categories.name: Claude Code Workflow
categories.description: Non-Bash tool permissions needed by skills that use subagents or file operations.

categories.name: Sandbox Filesystem Extensions
categories.description: Extends sandbox write access to directories used by claudiator workflows. Only useful when sandbox is enabled.

categories.name: Claudiator Platform
categories.description: MCP tool permissions for the claudiator skills platform (telemetry, feedback, sync). Requires MCP server URL configured in settings.json.
